name: S.I.T.F Quebec Team RP
description:
Quebec Team: Remote Operations/Winter Warfare Stealth and Sabotage Unit

Team Motto: "Silent as the Snowfall, Deadly as the Blizzard"

  • Team Members:

    1. Callsign: Blizzard-0-1

    • Nationality: Russian

    • Age: 36

    • Gender: Male

    • Previous Experience: Spetsnaz GRU

    • Specialty: Winter Survival, Stealth Infiltration, Close Quarters Combat

    1. Callsign: Blizzard-1-2

    • Nationality: Norwegian

    • Age: 32

    • Gender: Female

    • Previous Experience: MJK (Norwegian Special Forces)

    • Specialty: Arctic Warfare, Long-Range Reconnaissance, Ski Patrol

    1. Callsign: Blizzard-0-2

    • Nationality: Canadian

    • Age: 40

    • Gender: Male

    • Previous Experience: JTF2 (Canadian Special Forces)

    • Specialty: Cold Weather Operations, Sabotage, Explosives

    1. Callsign: Blizzard-2-1

    • Nationality: Finnish

    • Age: 38

    • Gender: Male

    • Previous Experience: Finnish Border Guard Jaeger Brigade

    • Specialty: Winter Camouflage, Sniping, Tracking

    1. Callsign: Blizzard-0-3

    • Nationality: Swedish

    • Age: 34

    • Gender: Female

    • Previous Experience: Swedish Army Ranger Battalion

    • Specialty: Cross-Country Movement, Skiing, Navigation

    Equipment:

    • Winter Camouflage Uniforms (e.g., White/Gray Snow Camo, White Multicam)

    • Ghillie Suits (White/Gray for snowy environments)

    • Cold-Weather Gear (Insulated Jackets, Snow Pants, Gloves, Balaclavas)

    • Skis and Snowshoes

    • Suppressed Firearms (e.g., HK416, CZ Bren 805, Sako TRG)

    • Thermal Imaging Devices

    • Snowmobiles and All-Terrain Vehicles

    • Explosives and Demolition Equipment

    Mission Profile:

    • Remote Reconnaissance in Arctic and Alpine Environments

    • Sabotage of Enemy Installations and Supply Lines

    • Stealth Infiltration and Exfiltration Operations

    • Capturing or Eliminating High-Value Targets

    • Training Indigenous Populations in Winter Warfare Tactics

  • Notable Operations:

    • Operation Snowfall: Sabotage of a Russian radar station in the Arctic Circle

    • Operation Frostbite: Rescue of a kidnapped scientist from a terrorist-held research facility in Greenland

    • Operation Avalanche: Destruction of a drug smuggling route through the Swiss Alps

    • Operation Igloo: Infiltration and capture of a rogue general's compound in the Canadian Rockies

    The Quebec Team specializes in operating in extreme cold weather conditions, utilizing their expertise in winter warfare to conduct covert missions in some of the world's harshest environments. Their unique skillset makes them an invaluable asset for high-risk operations in arctic regions.
creator: Exetior the Arch-demon
